findings.message: The 2-hour EXE stability JSON passes, but the final System Health screenshot shows replacement-character mojibake in several Chinese message/fix fields.
findings.evidence: System Health page final screenshot contains readable navigation and table layout, but some detail strings include black replacement diamonds instead of Chinese text.

findings.message: The current dist/sw_drawing_studio.exe evidence was captured before the source-level worker stdout UTF-8 hardening in this change.
findings.evidence: Source workers now force sys.stdout UTF-8, but a rebuilt EXE and fresh EXE UI evidence are still required before treating this as final Chinese UI acceptance.

next_required_action: Rebuild dist/sw_drawing_studio.exe from the UTF-8 worker sources, rerun EXE UI robot and 2-hour EXE stability, then visually inspect System Health screenshots again for readable Chinese text.
